---
title: "Martin Petr"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/bodkan
    - text: Research
      url: https://scholar.google.cz/citations?user=h9-xAdAAAAAJ
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:contact@bodkan.net"
    - text: Twitter
      url: https://twitter.com/dr_bodkan

---

I am a research programmer and geneticist at the University of Copenhagen, Denmark.

I work on spatial data analysis and simulation tools for population genetics and ecology,<br>
with an eye towards designing intuitive, reproducible interfaces for complex methods.

Previously, I worked on ancient DNA of Neanderthals and Denisovans.
